wiki.summary: Arguably one of Playboi Carti’s most experimental songs, due to the frequent repetition of sound effects and the hyperactive instrumental, “OPM BABI” delves into themes of substance abuse, sexual relationships, and violence. This track is an ode to Carti’s close affiliate, opiumbaby, the co-founder and creative director of the Opium label who has had a significant impact on shaping the label’s image and sound. Read more on Last.fm.
